message:
fix(stream): fix merge tests mixing heterogeneous stream types (bd-1mqi)

Use Box<dyn Stream> for tests that combine PendingEveryOther/UnknownUpper
with iter() streams, since Merge<S> requires homogeneous S. Also close
bd-36ua (codec framing already tested).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
